name: translate-manga
description: Distribute the translate-manga Codex skill for isolated manga page translation with image_gen.

interface.shortDescription: Translate manga pages with isolated image context.
interface.longDescription: Translate Manga provides a Codex skill for Chinese manga localization with one isolated subagent and one local image reference per image_gen call, plus deterministic output validation.
defaultPrompt: Use $translate-manga to translate these manga pages into Simplified Chinese.
